message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Interactions between the Control Plane (master node) and the Worker Node

hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor #000000
  LifeLineBorderColor #999999
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ParticipantBorderColor #333333
  ParticipantFontColor #000000
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #BFE3F2
  BoxBorderColor #333333
  BoxBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  GroupBorderColor #333333
  GroupBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  NoteBorderColor #333333
}

actor Georgina

participant "API-Server" as apiserver #BFE3F2
database "etcd" as etcd #BFE3F2
participant "Controller Manager" as cm #BFE3F2
participant "Scheduler" as sched #BFE3F2
participant "Power Operator" as pop #BFE3F2
participant "Kubelet" as kubelet #A8E6A3
participant "Power Node Agent" as pna #A8E6A3
participant "Power Optimization Library" as pol #A8E6A3
participant "K8s Objects" as k8sobj #A8E6A3
participant "Kube-Proxy" as kubeproxy #A8E6A3

legend right
|= Legend |
|<#BFE3F2> Control Plane ~ Master Node |
|<#A8E6A3> Worker Node |
|<#D9D9D9> Power Manager System Setup |
|<#FFF2CC> Power Manager Configuration |
|<#F4B183> Power Manager Deployment |
endlegend

== Kubernetes Initialization ==

Georgina -> apiserver : 1 kubectl create -f pod.yaml
apiserver -> etcd : 2 save new state
apiserver -> cm : 3 check for changes
sched -> apiserver : 4 watch for unassigned pods(s)
apiserver -> sched : 5 notify about pod w nodename=""
sched -> apiserver : 6 assign pod to node
apiserver -> etcd : 7 save new state
kubelet -> apiserver : 8 look for newly assigned pod(s)
apiserver -> kubelet : 9 bind pod to node
kubelet -> pna : 10 start container
kubelet -> apiserver : 11 update pod status
apiserver -> etcd : 12 save new state

== Power Manager Initialization ==

kubelet -> kubeproxy : 1 Ensure correct proxy configuration
kubelet -> kubelet : 2 Confirm CPU Manager policy
note right of kubelet #D9D9D9
cpuManagerPolicy = "static"
end note
kubelet -> kubelet : 3 Reserve System CPUs
note right of kubelet #D9D9D9
reservedSystemCPUs = "0"
end note

kubelet -> pna : 4 Create Namespace
note right of pna #FFF2CC
apply config/rbac/namespace.yaml
end note

kubelet -> pna : 5 Create RBAC and Service Accounts
note right of pna #FFF2CC
apply config/rbac/rbac.yaml
end note

kubelet -> k8sobj : 6 Create CRDs
note right of k8sobj #FFF2CC
make
end note

kubelet -> k8sobj : 7 Label nodes
note right of k8sobj #FFF2CC
label node <NODE_NAME> feature.node.kubernetes.io/power-node="true"
end note

== Power Manager Deployment ==

kubelet -> pna : 1 Deploy Controller Manager
note right of pna #F4B183
apply config/manager/manager.yaml
end note

kubelet -> pol : 2 Deploy the config
note right of pol #F4B183
examples/example-powerconfig.yaml
end note

kubelet -> pol : 3 Set Shared Profile
note right of pol #F4B183
examples/example-shared-profile.yaml
end note

kubelet -> pol : 4 Deploy th Workload
note right of pol #F4B183
examples/example-shared-workload.yaml
end note

kubelet -> pol : 5 Deploy Pod
note right of pol #F4B183
examples/example-pod.yaml
end note

== Power Manager additional functionality ==

=== Uncore ===
kubelet -> kubelet : 1 Confirm Kernel verson
note right of kubelet #D9D9D9
kernel 5.6+ required for uncore
end note

kubelet -> pol : 2 Set Freq in Die and Pkg
note right of pol #F4B183
examples/example-uncore
end note

kubelet -> pna : 3 Deploy Controller Manager
note right of pna #F4B183
apply config/manager/manager.yaml
end note

kubelet -> pol : 4 Deploy the config
note right of pol #F4B183
examples/example-powerconfig.yaml
end note

kubelet -> pol : 5 Set Shared Profile
note right of pol #F4B183
examples/example-shared-profile.yaml
end note

kubelet -> pol : 6 Deploy th Workload
note right of pol #F4B183
examples/example-shared-workload.yaml
end note

kubelet -> pol : 7 Deploy Pod
note right of pol #F4B183
examples/example-pod.yaml
end note

kubelet -> pol : 8 Set Time of Day functionality
note right of pol #F4B183
examples/example-timeofday
end note

=== P-State ===
kubelet -> pna : 1 Deploy Controller Manager
note right of pna #F4B183
apply config/manager/manager.yaml
end note

kubelet -> pol : 2 Deploy the config
note right of pol #F4B183
examples/example-powerconfig.yaml
end note

kubelet -> pol : 3 Set Shared Profile\nand configure the P-state governor
note right of pol #F4B183
examples/example-shared-profile.yaml
end note

kubelet -> pol : 4 Deploy th Workload
note right of pol #F4B183
examples/example-shared-workload.yaml
end note

kubelet -> pol : 5 Deploy Pod
note right of pol #F4B183
examples/example-pod.yaml
end note

=== C-State ===
kubelet -> pna : Deploy Controller Manager
note right of pna #F4B183
apply config/manager/manager.yaml
end note

kubelet -> pol : Deploy the config
note right of pol #F4B183
examples/example-powerconfig.yaml
end note

kubelet -> pol : Set Shared Profile
note right of pol #F4B183
examples/example-shared-profile.yaml
end note

kubelet -> pol : Deploy th Workload
note right of pol #F4B183
examples/example-shared-workload.yaml
end note

kubelet -> pol : Deploy Pod
note right of pol #F4B183
examples/example-pod.yaml
end note

kubelet -> pol : Set C-State functionality
note right of pol #F4B183
examples/example-cstates
end note

=== Time of Day ===
kubelet -> pna : Deploy Controller Manager
note right of pna #F4B183
apply config/manager/manager.yaml
end note

kubelet -> pol : Deploy the config
note right of pol #F4B183
examples/example-powerconfig.yaml
end note

kubelet -> pol : Set Shared Profile
note right of pol #F4B183
examples/example-shared-profile.yaml
end note

kubelet -> pol : Deploy th Workload
note right of pol #F4B183
examples/example-shared-workload.yaml
end note

kubelet -> pol : Deploy Pod
note right of pol #F4B183
examples/example-pod.yaml
end note

kubelet -> pol : Set Time of Day functionality
note right of pol #F4B183
examples/example-timeofday
end note

@enduml
```
